$messageId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('senderId').val() === auth.uid && (auth.uid === root.child('chats/' + $offerId + '/' + $buyerId + '/meta/sellerId').val() || auth.uid === root.child('chats/' + $offerId + '/' + $buyerId + '/meta/buyerId').val()) && newData.child('recipientId').val() !== auth.uid && (newData.child('recipientId').val() === root.child('chats/' + $offerId + '/' + $buyerId + '/meta/sellerId').val() || newData.child('recipientId').val() === root.child('chats/' + $offerId + '/' + $buyerId + '/meta/buyerId').val()) && newData.child('read').val() === false && newData.child('notified').val() === false) || (data.exists() && auth.uid === data.child('recipientId').val() && data.child('read').val() === false && newData.child('read').val() === true && newData.child('senderId').val() === data.child('senderId').val() && newData.child('recipientId').val() === data.child('recipientId').val() && newData.child('text').val() === data.child('text').val() && newData.child('createdAt').val() === data.child('createdAt').val() && newData.child('notified').val() === data.child('notified').val()))
$messageId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['senderId', 'recipientId', 'text', 'createdAt', 'read', 'notified']) && newData.child('senderId').isString() && newData.child('recipientId').isString() && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length > 0 && newData.child('text').val().length <= 2000 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && newData.child('read').isBoolean() && newData.child('notified').isBoolean()
